multiSelect.description: Use these keyboard shortcuts to work more efficiently with multiple tasks:

labels.noTasksForDate: No tasks scheduled for this date

messages.serverUnavailableDescription: The server is currently unavailable. Please check your connection and try again.

edit.nameQuestion: What is the name of this task?
edit.projectQuestion: Which project does this task belong to?
edit.labelsQuestion: Things to remember about this task or to tag it
edit.whoIsAssignedNext: Who is assigned the next due?
edit.noAssigneesAvailable: No assignees yet can perform this task
edit.selectAssignee: Select an assignee for this task
edit.assignmentStrategyQuestion: How to pick the next assignee for the following task?
edit.triggerDueDateHint: Due date will be set when the trigger condition is met
edit.giveTaskDueDate: Give this task a due date
edit.dueDateHelper: Task needs to be completed by a specific time
edit.nextDueQuestion: When is the next first time this task is due?
edit.specificTimeHelper: Task will be due at the specified time
edit.endOfDayHelper: Task will be due at the end of the day (11:59 PM)
edit.taskWindowDescription: Define when this task can be completed and when it expires
edit.completionWindowHelper: Task becomes available to complete X hours before the due date
edit.schedulingPreferencesQuestion: How to reschedule the next due date?
edit.rescheduleFromDueDateHelper: The next task will be scheduled from the original due date, even if the previous task was completed late
edit.rescheduleFromCompletionDateHelper: The next task will be scheduled from the actual completion date of the previous task
edit.notificationsBasicPlan: Task notifications are not available in the Basic plan. Upgrade to Plus to receive reminders when tasks are due or completed.
edit.notifyForTaskHelper: When should notifications be sent for this task?
edit.pointsHelper: Assign points to this task and users will earn points when they complete it
edit.requireAdminApprovalHelper: This task will need approval from an admin before being marked as complete
edit.privacyLimitedHelper: You and others who are assigned to the task
edit.privacyLimitedDisabled: No assignees selected, Limited option is disabled

validation.selectMonth: Please select at least one month

repeat.repeatHelper: Is this something that needs to be done regularly?
repeat.howOften: How often should it be repeated?
repeat.everyWeekHelper: Task repeats every week on selected days
repeat.weekOfMonthHelper: Task repeats on specific day occurrences each month (for example, 1st Monday or 3rd Friday)
repeat.occurrencePrompt: Select which occurrences of the selected days
repeat.occurrenceExample: Example: "1st Monday" means the first Monday of each month
repeat.triggerTask: Trigger this task based on a thing state
repeat.triggerHelper: Is this something that should be done when a thing state changes?
repeat.triggerBasicPlan: Thing-based triggers are not available in the Basic plan. Upgrade to Plus to automatically trigger tasks when device states change.

typeMessages.adaptive: This chore will be scheduled dynamically based on previous completion dates.
typeMessages.custom: This chore will be scheduled based on a custom frequency.

view.completionNotePlaceholder: Add a note about the completion...
view.skipTaskConfirm: Are you sure you want to skip this task?

addTask.title: Create new task
addTask.smartHelp: This feature lets you create a task simply by typing a sentence. It attempts to parse the sentence to identify the task's due date, priority, and frequency.
addTask.priorityExample: For highest priority use P1, Urgent, Important, or ASAP. For lower priorities, use P2, P3, or P4.
addTask.dueDateExample: Specify dates with phrases like tomorrow, next week, Monday, or August 1st at 12pm.
addTask.frequencyExample: Set recurring tasks with terms like daily, weekly, monthly, yearly, or patterns such as every Tuesday and Thursday.

notifications.undoFailedMessage: Unable to undo the action. Please try again.

timer.resetMessage: Are you sure you want to reset the timer? This will clear all time records since you started the task.
timer.clearMessage: This will permanently delete all timers for this task and set it back to "not started".
